characters.name: JUKU
characters.description: Väike inimene poiss lühikeste pruunide juuste ja säravate siniste silmadega, seljas roheline triiksärk ja sinised püksid. Rõõmsameelne ja uudishimulik, sõbralik näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: LIISA
characters.description: Väike inimene tüdruk pikkade heledate patsikeste ja suurte pruunide silmadega, seljas kollane kleit ja punased kingad. Naeratav ja abivalmis, rõõmsameelne näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: TOATUBA
locations.description: Cozy children's playroom with light blue walls, a soft colorful rug on the floor, and a single large window on the back wall showing green trees outside. A small wooden table with two chairs is in the center. A red toy box is in one corner, and a small bookshelf with colorful books is on another wall. Warm, inviting atmosphere. Cartoon style.

locations.name: HOOV
locations.description: Sunny green backyard with lush green grass and a few blooming spring flowers. A small, sturdy tree with some budding leaves is in the middle. A simple wooden fence runs along the back. Bright and cheerful atmosphere with soft natural light. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Juku and Liisa are sitting on the colorful rug in a cozy children's playroom with light blue walls. They are playing happily with colorful building blocks. A red toy box is in the corner and a small bookshelf is visible. Warm sunlight streams through the window showing green trees outside. Both children are smiling. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are standing near the window in the cozy children's playroom, looking out. Juku points excitedly at a small bird flying past the window. Liisa smiles, turning to Juku, as if getting a new idea. The playroom has light blue walls, a colorful rug, a red toy box, and a bookshelf. Warm sunlight fills the room. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are at the small wooden table in the cozy children's playroom. They are carefully looking through a small open box filled with various craft materials, including small, smooth wooden pieces. Liisa picks up a wooden piece, while Juku points to another. The playroom has light blue walls, a colorful rug, a red toy box, and a bookshelf. Sunlight streams through the window. Cartoon style.

Juku is sitting at the small wooden table in the cozy children's playroom, focused on assembling a simple wooden birdhouse from the gathered wooden pieces. He carefully attaches one piece to another. Liisa sits next to him, watching intently and smiling encouragingly. The playroom has light blue walls, a colorful rug, a red toy box, and a bookshelf. Warm light from the window illuminates the scene. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are working together at the small wooden table in the cozy children's playroom. Liisa is holding a wooden piece steady for Juku, who is carefully attaching another part to the birdhouse they are building. Both children are smiling and concentrating on their task. The playroom has light blue walls, a colorful rug, a red toy box, and a bookshelf. Sunlight streams through the window. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are standing proudly next to the small wooden table in the cozy children's playroom, holding up the finished, simple wooden birdhouse they built together. Both children have big smiles on their faces, happy with their creation. The playroom has light blue walls, a colorful rug, a red toy box, and a bookshelf. Sunlight from the window brightens the scene. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are walking towards the door of the cozy children's playroom, both carrying the finished wooden birdhouse carefully. They are smiling, excited to take it outside. The playroom has light blue walls, a colorful rug, a red toy box, and a bookshelf. Sunlight streams through the window. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are in the sunny green backyard. Juku is carefully placing the wooden birdhouse onto a low branch of the small tree in the middle of the yard. Liisa stands next to him, looking up with an excited smile. Green grass and a wooden fence are visible. The atmosphere is bright and cheerful. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are standing a short distance away from the small tree in the sunny green backyard. They are watching with wide smiles as a small, colorful bird flies towards the wooden birdhouse that is now hanging on the tree branch. Green grass and a wooden fence are visible. The atmosphere is bright and cheerful. Cartoon style.

Juku and Liisa are sitting on the lush green grass in the sunny backyard, looking up at the birdhouse on the tree branch where the small bird is now perched. Both children are smiling broadly, holding hands, clearly happy and proud. Blooming spring flowers are scattered in the grass. The wooden fence is visible in the background. The atmosphere is bright and cheerful. Cartoon style.
